description: Fix resource leaks across E2E test files: MCP server process leaks when launchExtensionContext fails, temp directory leaks when startMcpServer fails before try blocks, missing null guard in analyze-site afterAll, and conditional assertions that silently skip verification.

userStories.title: Fix MCP server process leak in onboarding.e2e.ts
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want MCP server processes to be properly cleaned up when launchExtensionContext throws, so that orphaned server processes don't accumulate during test failures.
acceptanceCriteria: All four tests in onboarding.e2e.ts wrap startMcpServer inside the try block (or use a nested try around launchExtensionContext that kills the server in its catch)
If launchExtensionContext throws after startMcpServer succeeds, the server process is killed before the error propagates
Existing test behavior is unchanged when tests pass

userStories.title: Fix temp dir leak in npm-discovery.e2e.ts and discovery-edge-cases.e2e.ts
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want temp directories and MCP server processes to be properly cleaned up when startMcpServer throws, so that temp directories don't accumulate and server processes don't leak on test failures.
acceptanceCriteria: In npm-discovery.e2e.ts, startMcpServer calls are inside try blocks so that configDir, prefixDir, and tmpDir are cleaned up if startMcpServer throws
In discovery-edge-cases.e2e.ts, startMcpServer calls are inside try blocks so that configDir and tmpDir are cleaned up if startMcpServer throws
Existing test behavior is unchanged when tests pass

userStories.title: Fix temp dir leak in resources-prompts.e2e.ts
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want temp directories to be cleaned up even when startMcpServer throws in the empty resource/prompt list tests.
acceptanceCriteria: In both empty-list tests in resources-prompts.e2e.ts, startMcpServer is called inside the try block
If startMcpServer throws, tmpDir and configDir are still cleaned up in the finally block
Existing test behavior is unchanged when tests pass

userStories.title: Fix missing null guard in analyze-site.e2e.ts afterAll and conditional assertion skips
userStories.description: As a test infrastructure maintainer, I want the afterAll hook to safely handle the case where beforeAll failed, and I want assertions to always execute rather than being conditionally skipped.
acceptanceCriteria: test.afterAll in analyze-site.e2e.ts has a null/undefined check before calling analyzeSiteServer.kill()
Conditional assertions at approximately lines 256-258 and 301-303 are replaced with unconditional assertions (expect the field to be defined, then assert on its value)
